_comment: Native-plant suppliers, seed houses, native-plant societies and native-landscape designers for the prairie provinces (V2.18; rebuilt V2.18.1 from the Native Plant Society of Saskatchewan (NPSS) 'Native Plant Material and Services Supplier List'). Feeds the 'Where to buy' site-panel section via src/db/nurseries.py. Every entry is NATIVE-SPECIFIC — general garden centres that do not focus on natives are deliberately excluded. 'sells' maps to the availability_class enum (native_specialist / seed_or_plug) so a supplier can be matched to a plant's sourcing tier.
_disclaimer: Compiled 2026 from the NPSS supplier list (npss.sk.ca) — a public-service directory, not an endorsement, and not guaranteed complete or current. Native plants and seed are seasonal and often grown to order, so confirm availability, hours and current stock before visiting or ordering. Coordinates are APPROXIMATE (community level), used only to sort suppliers by rough distance. The best first stop anywhere in SK is the NPSS (native plant sales, education and this list); many suppliers ship province-wide.
_provenance: Native Plant Society of Saskatchewan, Native Plant Material and Services Supplier List (npss.sk.ca). '✓ NPSS member' noted where the source marks it. No affiliation or endorsement implied.

nurseries.name: Native Plant Society of Saskatchewan (NPSS)
nurseries.notes: The provincial native-plant society — runs native plant sales and education across Saskatchewan and maintains the supplier list this directory is built from. Best first stop for sourcing natives anywhere in SK, including Regina, Lumsden and the Battlefords. (306) 668-3940 · info@npss.sk.ca

nurseries.name: Blazing Star Wildflower Seed Co.
nurseries.notes: SK-grown native prairie wildflower and grass seed (individual species, mixes, custom mixes); ships province-wide, so it serves Regina, Lumsden, Saskatoon and the Battlefords. ✓ NPSS member. (306) 253-4219

nurseries.name: Prairie Garden Seeds
nurseries.notes: North Battleford native wildflower and grass seed (plus open-pollinated crops) bred for short-season, dry-land conditions. Local to the Battlefords; ships across SK. (306) 937-5507

nurseries.name: A Prairie Bouquet
nurseries.notes: Native-plant seedlings of many species, sourced locally and more broadly, west of Saskatoon. ✓ NPSS member. (306) 380-6952 · mightycaragana@gmail.com

nurseries.name: Select Seedling Nursery / Lakeshore Tree Farm
nurseries.notes: Saskatoon nursery growing hardy native and shelterbelt seedlings for Zones 1–3 (since 1984); retail and wholesale. Contact for native species available. (306) 978-3333

nurseries.name: Shand Greenhouses (SaskPower)
nurseries.notes: SaskPower's greenhouse grows native trees, shrubs, wildflowers and grasses for Saskatchewan environmental projects — trees and shrubs are distributed FREE to SK groups and individuals doing wildlife-habitat, shelter or reclamation plantings. (306) 634-9771

nurseries.name: PRT Prince Albert
nurseries.notes: Custom-grown native forest seedlings (white spruce, jack pine) for central and northern SK — nearest large seedling grower to the Battlefords and Prince Albert. Retail and wholesale. (306) 953-4700

nurseries.name: Phillips Seeds Ltd.
nurseries.notes: Native grass seed (alongside cereals and pulses) in northeast SK; retail and wholesale. Contact for native species. (306) 873-5569

nurseries.name: Lichen Nature
nurseries.notes: Saskatoon-based native-plant garden design, small-scale restoration and nature education — a good local guide to sourcing and planting natives around Saskatoon. (306) 291-3877

nurseries.name: Prairie River Gardens
nurseries.notes: Saskatoon prairie-landscape consulting, design and installation using native plants. (306) 715-8000

nurseries.name: ALCLA Native Plants
nurseries.notes: Long-running native-plant nursery north of Calgary (since 1992): native forbs, grasses and shrubs as plugs, plus seed. Ships seed province-wide. ✓ NPSS member. (403) 889-4795

nurseries.name: Arnica Wildflowers
nurseries.notes: Grows native plants of the Edmonton area from untreated local seed, for pollinator, songbird and low-maintenance gardens. (780) 680-7217 · arnicawildflowers@gmail.com

nurseries.name: Wild About Flowers
nurseries.notes: Native wildflower and grass nursery south of Calgary; potted plants and seed. Listed by NPSS.

nurseries.name: TreeTime.ca
nurseries.notes: Alberta reforestation-stock grower: hardy native trees and shrubs as bare-root and plugs, mail-order across the prairies.

nurseries.name: Edmonton Native Plant Group
nurseries.notes: Volunteer group that hosts a large annual native plant sale in Edmonton — a good pointer to central-Alberta native stock. Check for the yearly sale date.
